reference: I am twenty-six weeks pregnant and due to go on maternity leave in three weeks. I am really struggling with pain in my ribs and my back. I am feeling depressed because of it. I am off work a lot, and everyone at work treats me poorly about it. Would my doctor sign me off work? I feel like I cannot cope with the pain and work anymore.
text: I am 26 weeks pregnant and due to go on maternity leave in three weeks. I am really struggling with pain in my ribs and my back. I am feeling depressed because of it. I am off work a lot and everyone at work treats me poorly about it. Would my doctor sign me off work? I feel like I cannot cope with the pain and work anymore.
